import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut b = -1
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = -1
      end
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or i == n
      if has
        nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        has = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43
      sign = 1
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x <= v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_line(line)
  let sorted = sort_asc(nums)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
